podcasts.title: ROLLUP: Prediction Market Bill | Solana DEX ATH | ETH Stablecoins ATH | Zcash Implodes | Vitalik “Trilemma Solved”
podcasts.description: Prediction markets are turning into real-time intelligence, and policymakers are already reacting. In this week’s Weekly Rollup, Ryan and David unpack the Venezuela “Maduro” trade, the debate over fairness vs. public signal, and Polymarket’s expansion into real estate markets. They also cover Bitcoin’s lowest-vol year ever, Solana’s DEX surge, Ethereum’s stablecoin settlement ATH, Morgan Stanley’s crypto ETF filings, Zcash’s governance blowup, Lighter’s massive $LIT airdrop, Vitalik’s “trilemma solved” claim, Wyoming’s state stablecoin, and Strategy’s path toward major indices. --- 📣ZAMA | $ZAMA PUBLIC AUCTION https://bankless.cc/zama-auction --- BANKLESS SPONSOR TOOLS: 🔮POLYMARKET | #1 PREDICTION MARKET https://bankless.cc/polymarket-podcast 👑BANKLESS PREMIUM | AD-FREE & BONUS EPISODES https://bankless.cc/spotify-premium 🎯THE DEFI REPORT | ONCHAIN INSIGHTS https://bankless.cc/the-defi-report 💰ICO WATCH | UPCOMING PUBLIC TOKEN SALES https://bankless.cc/ico-watch --- TIMESTAMPS & RESOURCES 0:00 Intro 2:49 Markets https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/2025-ray-dalio-kaf8e/ https://x.com/dampedspring/status/2008568524046991733 https://www.coinglass.com/pro/i/bl https://www.dlnews.com/articles/regulation/bitcoin-least-volatile-year/ https://x.com/NTmoney/status/2007111582317215767 https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2007167084980044071 https://x.com/smyyguy/status/2009282261384888407 https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2007980573365502161 https://x.com/ericbalchunas/status/2008527564550156315 https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2008926447205843202 https://x.com/Matt_Hougan/status/2008542347425149247 14:03 Did Polymarket reveal the Venezuela invasion hours prior the announcement?
